response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume portrays a senior/lead profile with no indication of willingness or readiness for an entry-level role in insurance-sector agile projects.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching/mentoring background
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices, CI/CD, and modern architectures
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is a hard requirement
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, raising retention and role-fit risks
Java experience is listed but not demonstrated in professional projects; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
